name: Sausage Crepes
recipeInstructions:
Crepe Batter: Combine eggs, milk, and oil in a bowl. Add flour and salt, beating well until smooth. Pour 2 tablespoons batter into a greased 9-inch preheated skillet. Tilt the skillet and cook on one side. Invert the crepe onto a plate. Repeat to make 20 crepes. Place 2 tablespoons sausage filling down the center of each crepe and roll up. Layer the rolled crepes in a large baking dish. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes, covered. Spoon topping over the crepes and bake, uncovered, for 5 more minutes.
Sausage Filling: Remove casing and crumble sausage in a skillet. Add onion and cook until done. Drain and add cheese and cream cheese, stirring until melted and ingredients are well blended. Topping: Mix butter and sour cream together. This recipe may be frozen after the crepes are filled. Makes 10 servings.
Cost: $5.10.
